english: Lexx.: resp., to forget; bsnyel-méd (bsnyel med) not forgetting or forgetful, mindful; bsnyel-gsó-ba (bsnyel gso ba) to remind, to put one in mind of a thing Mil. nt.
Lex. nas bsnyór-ba (nas bsnyor ba), acc. to Sch.: to sift barley.
the letter ṭ, cerebral t, Ssk. ट.
Hind. टका in W. imaginary coin, money of account, = 2 paisa or 1 d. — Different from it is

wylie: TaM ka, Tang ka, Tang kha, tang ka
english: Hind. टङ्का 1. in C. 2/3 rupee = 9 d., v. also rcód-taṅ (rcod tang) (v. rcod-pa (rcod pa) comp.). — 2. a gold and silver coin Tar. 112, 6. — 3. W. money in general.
the letter ḍ, cerebral d, Ssk. ड.
(डाकी Hind.: 'husband of a Ḍākini, Shaksp.) in Mil. prob. = Ḍākini, mká-'gro-ma (mkha' 'gro ma).
(डमरु) a small tympan or drum, with a handle and two balls fastened to it by a strap.
gen. *drag* (drag), Hind.: डाक, the post, letter-post.
Hind. डण्डी, the beam of a pair of scales; a kind of litter.
1. the letter t, tenuis, French t. — 2. num. fig.: 9. — 3. inst. of btags (btags), v. ya-btags (ya btags).
W. stick with a hook, hooked cane, crutch; *ta-ku-rú-ku* (ta ku ru ku) Ld. crooked, contracted, crippled.
W. bread, esp. the flat bread-cakes of India, commonly called 'chapátee'; *čú-ta-gir* (cu ta gir) Ld. boiled flour-dumplings; *ṭúl-ta-gir* (Tul ta gir) pancakes.
(Pers. تابا) gen. *tao* (tao) W. a flat iron pan without a handle.
W., tár-°bag (tar bag) C., a plate, *tá-bag dal-dál* (ta bag dal dal) W., *ter-tér* (ter ter) C., a
